name: @razroo/agentmd
description: Agent prompts as structured markdown, with a linter for structure and a harness that scores per-rule adherence — so iteration produces numbers, not vibes.

scripts.lint:examples: tsx src/cli.ts lint examples/outreach-writer.md && tsx src/cli.ts lint examples/minimal.md
scripts.lint:isolint: npm --silent run build --workspace @razroo/isolint && mkdir -p .render && tsx src/cli.ts render examples/outreach-writer.md --out .render/outreach-writer.md && node ../isolint/dist/cli/index.js lint .render/outreach-writer.md && tsx src/cli.ts render examples/minimal.md --out .render/minimal.md && node ../isolint/dist/cli/index.js lint .render/minimal.md
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run lint:examples && npm run lint:isolint
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm test
